testcase.name: integrity.evidence-manifest
testcase.system-out: Evidence manifest schema and SHA-256 passed.

testcase.name: consistency.contract
testcase.system-out: Contract hash and deterministic minimum agree.

testcase.name: consistency.result
testcase.system-out: Result, gate, process, trajectory, RPO, and RTO agree.

testcase.name: consistency.reports
testcase.system-out: Markdown and HTML are exact result-derived views.

testcase.name: integrity.checkpoint
testcase.system-out: Referenced checkpoint hash and metrics agree.
